📖 How to Play

🕹️ Controls

Use the joystick (bottom-left) to move. Press Clean (bottom-right) next to a dirty panel.

🌞 Goal

Clean panels before the 2-min timer runs out. Reach Level 10 to become the Master of Cleaning!

⭐ Scoring

• Dirty panel → +500 pts
• Bird poop → +750 pts
• Leaf → +750 pts

💧 Water & 🧂 Salt

Tank drains as you clean. Go to the blue water tank to refill. Salt removes tough stains faster.

🌟 Daily Goal

Clean 100 panels/day. 6-day streak = 1,000,000 bonus pts on day 6!

⚙️ Settings

🔒 Privacy Policy

SolarCleanGame · Version 4.10.2

Solar Clean – Solar Panel Cleaning Game

A free mobile game by Yaniv Waldman. Clean solar panels, earn points, and reach Level 10!

How to Play

Use the joystick to move. Press Clean next to a dirty panel. Refill your water tank to keep going.

About & Privacy

Ads served by Google AdSense. See Google Privacy Policy.
